name: Bajaj
description: India's pioneer in three-wheelers, renowned for reliability and the iconic RE series.

name: Piaggio
description: Italian heritage meets Indian transport. Famous for the powerful Ape cargo and passenger series.

name: Mahindra
description: Leading the EV revolution in three-wheelers with the Treo range and robust Alfa diesel series.

name: TVS
description: Renowned for the TVS King series, offering superior comfort, durability, and mileage.

name: Atul Auto
description: A reliable name in cargo and passenger auto-rickshaws, offering robust metal bodies and high payloads.

name: YC Electric
description: One of India's largest selling electric rickshaw brands, highly popular in Northern India.

name: Altigreen
description: Pioneers in high-performance electric cargo three-wheelers built for heavy utility.

name: Euler Motors
description: Makers of Euler HiLoad EV, India's highest payload-carrying cargo electric three-wheeler.

name: Omega Seiki
description: Rage series cargo and passenger EVs designed for smart city logistics.

name: Kinetic Green
description: Pioneering green mobility with passenger and cargo e-rickshaws and e-autos.

name: Lohia Auto
description: Reliable range of Humrahi passenger e-rickshaws and Narain cargo vehicles.

name: Saera Electric
description: Makers of Mayuri e-rickshaws, providing clean and affordable passenger transport.

name: Montra Electric
description: A brand by Tube Investments (Murugappa Group) redefining premium electric three-wheelers.

name: Terra Motors
description: Japanese EV brand focusing on quality design and long-lasting battery packs.

name: Mini Metro
description: Cost-effective cargo loaders and e-rickshaws widely used in tier-2 and tier-3 cities.

name: Saarthi
description: Sturdy passenger and loader e-rickshaws by Yatri Auto India.

name: City Life
description: Durable and highly customizable passenger electric rickshaws.

name: Jezza Motors
description: Offering high-efficiency battery management systems and durable body structures.

name: Mahindra Electric
description: Dedicated electric vehicle wing of Mahindra & Mahindra.

name: Kinetic
description: Legendary Indian brand with modern green solutions for public transport.
